svg.title: Closet two memory fragment (apartment four) - preserved utility closet
svg.desc: Looking straight into a tightly framed white-painted utility closet. Three shelves stack from top to bottom and a step stool sits on the floor between two matching pails. Every shelf is laid out in perfect left-right symmetry across the center: four matching apothecary jars on the top, two pairs of spray bottles flanking a folded towel stack on the middle, two large bottles flanking a four-pack of paper towels on the bottom. Items are clean. The light is even. Nothing is in active use. Nothing animates.
